_note: Golden column_values for the Direct formatter (§12). One entry per supported column type. The 'file' column (files_mkvb) is intentionally ABSENT — files are attached via the assets flow AFTER the item exists (§12.2). This is the plain object that gets JSON.stringify()'d into the column_values GraphQL variable.
